desc.en: A remake of the libretro melonDS core that prioritizes standalone parity, reliability, and usability. This core closely follows the feature set of standalone melonDS; it features OpenGL-accelerated upscaling, multiple screen layouts, and Wi-Fi emulation. Based on melonDS commit f6692df.
desc.zh: [melonDS DS] 是 libretro melonDS 核心的重制版，优先追求功能与独立版一致，并注重稳定性与易用性。该核心紧跟独立版 melonDS 的功能特性，支持 OpenGL 加速画面提升、多种屏幕布局以及 Wi-Fi 模拟。基于 melonDS 提交版本 f6692df。
